Lines: .SYNOPSIS  Archive old completed/closed pipeline items to reduce live registry size.
Items with status Done or Closed whose lastUpdated is older than AgeDays are moved
The live registry is then rewritten with the remaining items.
No data is deleted; archive files are cumulative across months.
.PARAMETER WhatIf         Report what would be archived without making changes.
Write-CronLog -Message "PipelineCompact WhatIf: would archive $($archivable.Count) items, keep $($live.Count)" -Severity 'Info' -Source 'PipelineCompact'
Write-CronLog -Message "PipelineCompact: no items eligible for archiving (threshold: ${AgeDays}d)" -Severity 'Info' -Source 'PipelineCompact'
# Write archive file (cumulative append per month)
# Write trimmed live registry (Compress for storage efficiency)
Write-CronLog -Message "PipelineCompact: archived $($archivable.Count) items to $archivePath; $($live.Count) items remain in live registry" -Severity 'Info' -Source 'PipelineCompact'
